Responsible gambling

If playing stops being fun, stop playing. This page lists the tools we offer and where to get external help.

Who can play

Matrix Spins is strictly for people aged 18 or over. Every account must supply a date of birth on registration; underage accounts are rejected server-side.

Tools on your account

  • Deposit limits — set daily, weekly, and monthly caps from your account page. Decreases apply immediately; increases require operator approval and a 24-hour cool-down.
  • Loss limits, wager cap, session clock, reality checks, self-exclusion — available from the responsible-gambling control bar in the main app.
  • Account deletion — fully remove your account and PII at any time via the self-service page.
  • Two-factor authentication — strongly recommended. Reduces the chance a compromised account is used to deposit against your wishes.

Warning signs

  • Spending more than you intended, more often than you intended.
  • Chasing losses — depositing again to "win back" what you lost.
  • Lying to people close to you about how much or how often you play.
  • Feeling anxious, irritable, or depressed when you can't play.
  • Borrowing money or selling possessions to fund play.

External help

National Problem Gambling Helpline
Free, confidential, 24/7 — call 1-800-522-4700 or visit ncpg.org.
GamCare (UK)
gamcare.org.uk — support, advice, and treatment for anyone affected by gambling harm.
BeGambleAware
begambleaware.org — independent advice and a directory of treatment providers.
Gamblers Anonymous
gamblersanonymous.org — peer-support meetings worldwide.

Self-exclusion

If you need to stop, use the self-exclusion control in the main app to block your own access for a chosen period. You can also delete your account entirely from the account page.
